reviews.review_description: This is very similar to Epic Roller Coasters (made by same developer), but with a low poly graphic style that looks really nice and importantly, it runs great on the Go. All coasters offer both a regular ride version and a shooting version (much like epic roller coasters). What is really nice about these coasters is that each one offers a number of scenic changes during the ride. Try out the free one and if you like it I would say the DLC is definitely worth it because the other coasters are just as good and just as long (the Western coaster and Robot ones are my favorites).

reviews.review_title: Dart game bad, shooting gallery great
reviews.review_description: I purchased the dart game (there isn’t a free trial for any of the games) and was very disappointed. Instead of being able to throw the darts with your hand, they bizarrely shoot out of the space between your eyes when you press the controller button. Consequently aiming and power are very hard to control and you get a pain in your neck quickly. However, the shooting gallery game is a great simulation — very well designed, challenging, and a lot of fun.

I love these rides.  I also love the ferris wheel. 
When I just want to sit and chill I go on the ferris wheel. I love the Music that plays while I'm on it.Thank you for creating EPIC ROLLERCOASTERS and EPIC FUN. I learned that the Oculus Go is being discontinued. I this and would really love too see crossover too the Oculus Quest library. Thank you. Hello, I just watched a video from Epic Fun. This video had 2 hands. Is there a Quest Version of this app? And if so, would I be able too have it on Quest without paying for it again?

Sweet! Love to see more content from them!👍not trying to be too negative, but The frame rate seems to be too low, way to much flickering and the motion is not smooth at All. But I'm on an Oculus Go, so that could be part of the problem...

developer_response.body: Hi Brock, the FPS should be stable on Oculus Go. We just sent an update out with some improvements especially on main menu. If the low FPS persists try to reboot the device. Let me know! Thanks for being in touch.

reviews.review_description: I got in the app and couldn’t get out.

This is by far my favourite rollercoaster app on Go (my favourite on Quest is Epic rollercoasters from the same devs). 

Ridiculous this has been criticized by some as having too simplistic graphics. The Oculus Go runs on a primitive mobile chipset, expectations need to moderated with this in mind. Basic as the graphics are, they are nonetheless stunningly beautiful. Moreover, one can control the speed, something sadly lacking in all other rc apps. All too many times one is forced to whizz past scenery at a million miles an hour. Fine for that existing as an option, but other devs need to recognize a need for the option of moving at a slower speed and be able to appreciate the view.  

Really hope these devs continue to work on new apps and updates for existing ones. They are exceptional at what they do.

I was excited to see that B4T Games had released another roller coaster game, because their "Epic Roller Coasters" is a very nice and polished product. It's the standard by which I judge other similar games. In comparison, this is nowhere nearly as nice. The graphics are rendered at a much, much lower quality and everything about this feels cheap, rushed and unfinished. Essentially, this product feels like a cheap cash grab. I won't be buying the "complete package" for 9.99 this time. This was a disappointment.

Edit: I have now been in contact with B4T Games, sent them my screenshots and they have verified that there is no bug. The graphics are supposed to look like this. It's a shame, they're capable of so much better.

developer_response.body: Hey Fredrik! Yeah that's right! Epic Fun has a new kind of graphics idea like showed up in the store page, screenshots and video, it's not low quality but low poly art style. We're sorry that you didn't like it.

reviews.review_description: How much are the in app purchases? I don't see a price?

developer_response.body: Hey there, just click on BUY buttons and you'll be redirected to the Oculus store to see the prices. Thanks.

reviews.review_description:
It looked fun and had plenty of games free, but you cannot use gamepad inputs on it even though it said it could support gamepad. I primarily use my DualShock 4 for playing on my Samsung Gear VR on my S7, but this game cannot use gamepads like most games. I also tried a touchpad, which it said it supports, but it doesn't support that either! Not everyone has a fancy VR controller! It also crashes in about 30 seconds of use for me. Don't recommend any other games from this developer because it is pay-to-play and the free games don't have any experiences unless you pay for them. 
I'm not ever coming back to this game.
